allow: PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $magick = Get-Command magick -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { "python: $\($py.Source\)" } else { "python: NOT FOUND" }; if \($magick\) { "magick: $\($magick.Source\)" } else { "magick: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($src = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\image.png'; $logo = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\logo.png'; $ico = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\logo.ico'; & magick $src '\(' '+clone' '-colorspace' 'Gray' '-level' '30%,70%' '-negate' '\)' '-compose' 'CopyOpacity' '-composite' $logo; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "logo.png written \($\(\(Get-Item $logo\).Length\) bytes\)" } else { "logo.png FAILED \($LASTEXITCODE\)" }; & magick $logo -background none -gravity center -resize 256x256 -extent 256x256 -define 'icon:auto-resize=256,128,64,48,32,16' $ico; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "logo.ico written \($\(\(Get-Item $ico\).Length\) bytes\)" } else { "logo.ico FAILED \($LASTEXITCODE\)" })

PowerShell($logo = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\logo.png'; & magick $logo -background '#070510' -alpha remove -alpha off "$env:TEMP\\logo-on-dark.png"; "$env:TEMP\\logo-on-dark.png"; & magick identify $logo)
PowerShell(& magick $logo -format "logo center: %[pixel:p{w/2,h/2}]`nlogo top-left: %[pixel:p{0,0}]`nAlpha channel: %A`n" info:)

PowerShell($src = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\image.png'; $logo = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\logo.png'; $ico = 'c:\\Users\\Gaj\\Desktop\\Coding-Projects\\AI-Kab\\logo.ico'; & magick $src -alpha set -bordercolor '#edebe8' -border 1 -fuzz 22% -fill none -floodfill +0+0 '#edebe8' -shave 1x1 $logo; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { "logo.png FAILED \($LASTEXITCODE\)"; exit 1 }; & magick $logo -trim +repage $logo; "logo.png: $\(\(Get-Item $logo\).Length\) bytes"; & magick $logo -format "center: %[pixel:p{w/2,h/2}]`ntop-left: %[pixel:p{0,0}]`ndims: %wx%h`n" info:; & magick $logo -background none -gravity center -resize 256x256 -extent 256x256 -define 'icon:auto-resize=256,128,64,48,32,16' $ico; "logo.ico: $\(\(Get-Item $ico\).Length\) bytes")
